message:
fix(ci): Update dtolnay/rust-action to dtolnay/rust-toolchain

The dtolnay/rust-action repository does not exist. The correct action
name is dtolnay/rust-toolchain which provides Rust toolchain installation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-action@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
         with:
           components: rustfmt
 
@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-action@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
         with:
           components: clippy
 
@@ -59,7 +59,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-action@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
         uses: actions/cache@v4
@@ -130,7 +130,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-action@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
 
       - name: Install uv
         uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
@@ -171,7 +171,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-action@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
 
       - name: Install uv
         uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
